case_title: OLGA TIKHONOVA ET AL VS. FIDELITY BROKERAGE SERVICES LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-27-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY BROKERAGE SERVICES LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,900.00 FILED BY TIKHONOVA, OLGA SEVERINOV, SERGEI AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY BROKERAGE SERVICES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFFS OLGO TIKHONOVA AND SERGEI SEVERINOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIDELITY BROKERAGE SERVICES LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSHUA NEWSOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIKHONOVA, OLGA SEVERINOV, SERGEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY BROKERAGE SERVICES LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
